name: gesture-tap
title: Gesture Tap
description: A contact circle taps a mobile pill button, releases it into a new labeled accent state, and lifts away.
evidence: Video Primitives v1 Wave F U1 gesture-tap contract

variables.label: Tap label
variables.description: Button label shown before the tap response.

variables.label: Response label
variables.description: Button label shown when the tap releases.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used for the completed button state and response pulse.
